sections.name: Risk Factors
sections.text: Export controls and geopolitical restrictions may delay customer shipments and adversely affect revenue. Supply constraints may affect product availability and data center deployments. Cybersecurity incidents could disrupt operations.

sections.name: Management Discussion and Analysis
sections.text: Revenue increased 30% year over year to $44.1 billion because data center demand grew across cloud and enterprise customers. Operating income improved because product margins were stronger in accelerated computing platforms.

validated_claims.claim: Revenue increased 30% year over year to $44.1 billion because data center demand grew
validated_claims.verbatim_span: Revenue increased 30% year over year to $44.1 billion because data center demand grew
validated_claims.why_it_matters: Supports bull case if data center demand persists next quarter.
validated_claims.falsifier: If revenue growth decelerates below 30% next quarter, bull case weakens.

validated_claims.claim: Export controls may delay customer shipments and adversely affect revenue
validated_claims.verbatim_span: Export controls and geopolitical restrictions may delay customer shipments and adversely affect revenue
validated_claims.why_it_matters: Bear case if restrictions tighten or segment disclosure shows impact.
